programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: The ultimate singing show is back, join judges Shreya Ghoshal, Vishal Dadlani & Badshah for a new season packed with amazing voices, thrilling moments, and pure entertainment!

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Crime Patrol - 26 Jurm, 26 Cases
programme.desc: Subodh Khanna, insurance mogul, disappears without a trace. Meanwhile, his wife's suicide video evidence sparks doubts among investigators about the case's true nature.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai intervenes when a few people decide to drag Mansingh to the police station. On the other hand, the residents of Shirdi are shocked when the British officials make a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Upon realising the value of freedom, the trio decides to help Mansingh secure safe passage. In the meantime, Sai helps a man who refused to pay heed to his warning.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Major Billy threatens to hit Sai if the villagers fail to reveal Mansingh's whereabouts. Meanwhile, Keshav and Tatya protest against that British officer's tyranny.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai's intervention saves the day for Mansingh as he almost gets caught by the officers. On the other hand, Kulkarni gives a valuable piece of advice to General Billy.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal calls Asit and expresses his gratitude for sponsoring the trip to Singapore.Goli gives his father a pleasant surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita and Jethalal relive their Singapore trip memories with Iyer. Popatlal begins his day with radiating positivity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal spreads his positive energy around Gokuldham Society. Jethalal decides to surprise Bagha and Nattu Kaka, but he is the one who ends up surprised.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal braces himself when he hears that Daya's brother Sunder is about to visit. On the other hand, an overexcited Daya wakes him up early the next day to get milk for Sunder.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder visits Gokuldham Society, much to the dismay of Jethalal. When Jethalal carries Sundar's luggage to his house, Sundar notices that the bag containing his belongings is missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder realises that he left his bag containing his belongings in Ahmedabad. He tells the Gada family about a brand new investment scheme that makes Jethalal sceptical.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder introduces his scheme to the men of Gokuldham Society, who refuse the offer, prompting Daya to try to convince all the ladies to invest in the enterprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies set off to arrange money to invest in Sunder's scheme. Jethalal learns that Babita has agreed to invest in the offer and decides to do the same despite his reservations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After investing in Sundarlal's scheme, everyone starts enquiring about their money to Jethalal and Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sunder fails to respond to the society members' calls, Jethalal reluctantly agrees to pay them back. However, Sunder shocks everyone by arriving in the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder returns everyone's invested money with interest. The ladies meet again to discuss their favourite television serial, but an issue puts a halt to it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and Daya try to convince Tapu and Jethalal to have breakfast. The residents complain about the water problems in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents try to get Bhide to solve the water problem, but he is busy buying vegetables; Abdul takes it upon himself to fix the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents realise someone is locked inside the building. Potpatlal thinks Bhide is responsible for the water problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya finds an unconscious woman lying on the terrace of the building and the residents take her to Dr Haathi. Popatlal wants to know if the woman is single.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha rushes in to serve Jethalal tea as he gets down to work. Bagha and Natu Kaka argue in English. The ladies take care of Bharti and get to know her better.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing Bharti's story, Daya decides to do something about the catcallers. Soon, the ladies of Gokuldham hatch a plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and Bharti lead the residents of Gokuldham to confront the catcallers and make them take responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents call the police on the catcallers. Soon, they are escorted to their parents, and the residents expose what they have been doing to women.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's family suffer multiple setbacks when Champaklal goes missing at the train station. A worried Daya seeks help from the media.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Drama Category.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi
programme.desc: Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Diya Aur Baati Hum
programme.desc: As Sandhya exits the examination hall, a bomb blast takes place in Pushkar. This leaves Bhabho worried, who tells the family that Sooraj may be at the site.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Tod Kar Dil Mera
programme.desc: Raushni supports her husband's dream of becoming an IAS officer. However, will a betrayal change her life and aspirations?

programme.title: Taara
programme.desc: Taara, a gifted singer, and Yuvraaj, a wealthy heir, are bound by deep love. However, as class and family honour collide, the couple must confront relentless opposition to keep their love alive.

programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram
programme.desc: Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: A young woman's unexpected bond with a much older businessman brings emotional twists while challenging societal expectations and family ideals.

programme.title: Jagadhatri
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to her family, a young woman leads a double life as an undercover intelligence officer, determined to clear her mother's name.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: A young woman's unexpected bond with a much older businessman brings emotional twists while challenging societal expectations and family ideals.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: A young woman's unexpected bond with a much older businessman brings emotional twists while challenging societal expectations and family ideals.

programme.title: Jagadhatri
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to her family, a young woman leads a double life as an undercover intelligence officer, determined to clear her mother's name.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.
